Email 1: The Set Up



1. Reason for the Sale 

Celebrating a Holiday

Label SNAFU

New Packaging

Warehouse is Full

Your Birthday

Etc. 



II. Time Limit

X Hours or Until We Move “Y” Bottles (If Physical)



III. HUGE Savings

Note with HLH – I put the savings off the “normal” retail price. This allowed me to make the savings even bigger, but it still was a discount off our normal price. 



IV. Remind Them To Stock Up and Share With Others (For Physical)

Friends and Family





Email 2: The Sale Is Crushing It



I. Social Proof

II. Inventory Moving Fast

III. Remind Them Of Sale





Email 3: “Last Chance”



I. Barely any left (for physical)

II. Better act now

III. Remind them of benefit. 





Email 4: Actual “Last Chance” 

I. The Sale Went Great!

II. But Some People Weren’t Able to Order

III. I Want To Be Fair

IV. So I’m Re-Opening the Sale for “X” Hours
